name: dev-skills
description: Production-grade software engineering skills packaged for OpenAI Codex.

author.name: Alan Martini (originally based on work by Addy Osmani)

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflows for Codex, from spec to ship.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-only bundle of software engineering skills covering specification, planning, implementation, testing, review, security, performance, documentation, session handoffs, explicit compressed communication, changelog and version release preparation, and launch readiness.
defaultPrompt: Pick the right skill for this task.
Use TDD to implement this change.
Create a handoff for the next Codex session.
Create a changelog fragment for this change.
